message.content:
@startuml
autonumber
left to right direction
actor "系统用户" as user
actor "问卷系统" as system
actor "受调查者" as respondent

user -> system : 请求创建问卷
system -> user : 发送验证码验证用户
user -> system : 验证通过后创建问卷
system -> system : 创建问卷
system -> respondent : 生成问卷网址和二维码
respondent -> system : 回答问卷
user -> system : 查看问卷答卷
@enduml
